ranked_movies.title: Lord of the Rings
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently recommended as the ultimate comfort movie trilogy, praised for its rewatchability and epic scale that provides a perfect escape.

ranked_movies.title: The Princess Bride
ranked_movies.reason: Consistently mentioned across multiple threads as a classic comfort film that combines romance, adventure, and humor.

ranked_movies.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a feel-good comfort movie that captures the spirit of adventure and rebellion.

ranked_movies.title: Clue
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently suggested as a comfort movie with great rewatch value due to its clever plot and multiple endings.

ranked_movies.title: My Cousin Vinny
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended as a comfort comedy with memorable performances and quotable dialogue.

ranked_movies.title: The Secret Life of Walter Mitty
ranked_movies.reason: Central to a discussion about inspiring 'life journey' films that encourage personal growth and adventure.

ranked_movies.title: The Way
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently discussed as an inspiring soul-searching film about personal transformation and the Camino de Santiago pilgrimage.

ranked_movies.title: Forgetting Sarah Marshall
ranked_movies.reason: Top recommendation for someone dealing with heartbreak, praised for its humorous yet genuine portrayal of post-breakup recovery.

ranked_movies.title: Young Frankenstein
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a classic comfort comedy with brilliant parody and memorable performances.

ranked_movies.title: The Breakfast Club
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested as a comfort coming-of-age film that explores teenage struggles and relationships.

ranked_movies.title: Innerspace
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted as an underrated 80s comedy with impressive special effects and Martin Short's performance.

ranked_movies.title: Death to Smoochy
ranked_movies.reason: Top recommendation for films with meaningful clown characters, featuring Robin Williams and Edward Norton.

ranked_movies.title: Under the Tuscan Sun
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended in both heartbreak and soul-searching contexts as a film about rediscovering purpose after personal tragedy.

ranked_movies.title: Wild
ranked_movies.reason: Discussed as a soul-searching journey film based on Cheryl Strayed's memoir about hiking the Pacific Crest Trail.

ranked_movies.title: Tron: Legacy
ranked_movies.reason: Extensively discussed for its groundbreaking visuals and iconic Daft Punk soundtrack, despite mixed reviews of the plot.

ranked_movies.title: Shakes the Clown
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a cult classic about clowns, described as 'the Citizen Kane of alcoholic clown movies'.

ranked_movies.title: Better Off Dead
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted as an underrated 80s comedy that was overlooked during its time but gained cult status.

ranked_movies.title: The Straight Story
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a soul-searching film about a man's cross-country journey on a lawnmower to reconcile with his brother.

ranked_movies.title: Belladonna of Sadness
ranked_movies.reason: Extensively analyzed as a feminist masterpiece with powerful themes of sexual liberation and patriarchal oppression.

ranked_movies.title: A League of Their Own
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a comfort sports comedy with heart and memorable performances.
